title: Stalybridge and Diggle (Saddleworth): Transport and Works Act order
body: "This application seeks approval to grant Network Rail powers in relation to the section of the TransPennine railway line between Stalybridge and Diggle (Saddleworth). These include:   the construction and operation of works on the railway conferring powers to close and replace existing level crossings   The application includes:   approval for the relocation of Mossley Station upgrading Greenfield Station the reconstruction of various bridges, tunnels and highway   Application details  The application is being made under the Transport and Works Act 1992.   order: Network Rail - Stalybridge to Diggle (Saddleworth) Enhancements application status: live application date of application: 7 November 2025 applicant: Network Rail via Eversheds Sutherland (International) LLP  "
